creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:

  ports/devel/viewvc/Makefile, r. 1.33 
  ports/devel/viewvc/files/patch-svn-r1993, r. 1.1

Works for me.  PR can be closed.

Philip, thanks for hanling this!
